description: This file defines the application class for an Android app, managing initialization of authentication, token storage, API client, and handling safe mode fallback scenarios.

classes.name: SecureSampleApp
classes.description: Main application class handling initialization, safe mode detection, and lazy API client creation.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Overrides the Application's onCreate to initialize components, detect safe mode, and handle initialization errors.

methods.name: getOrCreateApiClient
methods.description: Returns an existing ApiClient or creates one if appropriate, respecting safe mode.
